title: Refresh droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Refresh droids''' were aim-mobile support [[Droid/Legends|droids]] used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] on battlefields during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In the latter stages of the conflict, they were partnered with [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|IG-227 ''Hailfire''-class droid tanks]] to replenish their warhead launchers. They were produced by [[Haor Chall Engineering/Legends|Haor Chall Engineering]].

Refresh droids were manufactured after the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] retired the ''Hailfire''s from the battlefield due to their limited supply of thirty rocket warheads at a time. With the production of refresh droids, ''Hailfire''s once again saw action.
